evals.prompt: I have an idea for an AI app that makes team meetings way better. Grill me until it is ready for an engineer.
evals.expected_output: Asks ranked, adaptive questions; surfaces users, value, data/privacy, workflow, failure modes, and success measures; finishes with a decision-complete brief rather than code.

evals.prompt: We need SSO for enterprise customers. Help me uncover everything we have not decided before the team estimates it.
evals.expected_output: Separates outcome from SSO implementation, resolves providers/protocols, tenancy, provisioning, recovery, migration, audit and acceptance behavior.
